jobs.name: daily-summary
jobs.prompt: List all files modified in the last 24 hours in the sandbox and produce a brief summary of each.

jobs.name: weekly-report
jobs.prompt: Produce a one-page markdown report listing all documents in the sandbox, grouped by subfolder, with file sizes and last-modified dates. Save it as rapport-hebdo.md.

jobs.name: health-check
jobs.prompt: List the files in the sandbox root. Confirm the Drive connection is working. Reply with OK or describe any errors.
